next_video_brief.hook: What if I told you that AI can help you cook like a pro?
next_video_brief.script_direction: Create a video that showcases 5 AI-powered kitchen tools, with a focus on how they can help viewers cook like a pro. Include a mix of visuals, demonstrations, and testimonials to make the video engaging and informative

strategic_recommendations: Create more content around trending topics like kitchen hacks and space and astronomy
Use attention-grabbing titles and hooks that create curiosity
Incorporate more visuals and storytelling into videos to make them more engaging
Collaborate with other creators or influencers in the niche to reach a wider audience
